cases.title: fix(agents): handle explicit empty tool lists in system prompt

cases.title: Telegram/documents: sanitize binary payloads to prevent prompt input inflation
cases.expectedNotes: The body substantially follows the PR template, including scoped summary, verification, security impact, and human review details.

cases.title: Show message timestamps and completed agent runtime in detail mode

cases.title: fix: filter binary content from Telegram captions to prevent token explosion
